name: Lead to Outreach
intent: Take an inbound lead, enrich it, decide if it fits our ICP, write it into the CRM, and send a personalized outreach email — pausing for my approval before the email actually goes out. A full sales-agent chain across enrichment, CRM, and email. Every step is

seed.icp: self-hosting technical teams of 10-200 building internal AI tooling

nodes.role: Enrich the inbound lead by researching lead_company on the web. Find real public signal about the company — its size, sector, what it builds, its tech. Output object keys: company_facts (a tight list of the concrete facts you found), enriched (true if you found real signal).

Score the lead against our 'icp'. Using the enrich 'company_facts', decide fit. Output object keys: fit (an INTEGER 0-100), reason (one sentence grounded in the facts), qualified (true only if fit >= 60).
Write the qualified lead into the CRM by POSTing the enriched facts and fit score to {{input.crm_url}}. This is a reversible write. Output object key: contact_id.

Write a personalized outreach email to the lead grounded ONLY in the enriched facts and the qualify reason — warm, specific, one clear next step, no invented claims. Output object keys: subject, body (plain text, 3-5 sentences).

Send the drafted email (draft.subject / draft.body) to lead_email. This MESSAGES A HUMAN, so the run PAUSES here and shows me the exact email to approve, edit, or reject before a single message leaves. Nothing is sent without my explicit go-ahead. Output object key: sent.
The lead did not meet the ICP threshold. Note why (use qualify.reason) — no CRM write, no email sent. One line for the record.

icp.label: Your ideal-customer profile
icp.default: self-hosting technical teams of 10-200 building internal AI tooling
